name: com.muffindev.corelibrary
description: Contains base tools and helpers to improve game development in Unity. Note that this is used as a dependency for most of other Muffin Dev for Unity libraries. Standalone packages though, only embed the needed scripts from this core library.
licenseName: Creative Commons Attribution Share Alike 4.0 International
description_zhCN: 包含用于改进Unity中游戏开发的基本工具和帮助程序。请注意，这被用作大多数其他Muffin Dev for Unity库的依赖项。

name: com.muffindev.multipleeditors
description: Unity plugin that allows you to make multiple editors that target the same type, and manage them from the editor.
licenseName: Creative Commons Attribution Share Alike 4.0 International
description_zhCN: Unity插件，使您可以创建多个针对同一类型的编辑器，并从该编辑器进行管理。
